ddls:
CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the patient */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the patient */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the patient */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the patient */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the patient */,
  "emergency_contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the emergency contact */,
  "emergency_contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the emergency contact */,
  "insurance_provider" TEXT /* Name of the insurance provider */,
  "insurance_id" TEXT /* Patient's insurance ID */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the patient */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the patient */,
  "date_of_death" TEXT /* Date of death of the patient */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "treatments" (
  "treatment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each treatment */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient undergoing the treatment */,
  "treatment_name" TEXT /* Name of the treatment */,
  "physician_id" INTEGER /* ID of the physician who prescribed the treatment */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department where the treatment was administered */,
  "treatment_start" TEXT /* Start date of the treatment */,
  "treatment_stop" TEXT /* Stop date of the treatment */,
  "riluzole" INTEGER /* Indication of riluzole usage */,
  "treatment_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the treatment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("treatment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_treatments_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_treatments_physician_id FOREIGN KEY ("physician_id") REFERENCES providers ("provider_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_treatments_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES providers ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "diagnoses" (
  "diagnosis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each diagnosis */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient with the diagnosis */,
  "physician_id" INTEGER /* ID of the physician who made the diagnosis */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department where the diagnosis was made */,
  "diagnosis" TEXT /* Name of the diagnosis */,
  "diagnosis_date" TEXT /* Date when the diagnosis was made */,
  "diagnosis_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the diagnosis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("diagnosis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_diagnoses_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES providers ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_diagnoses_physician_id FOREIGN KEY ("physician_id") REFERENCES providers ("provider_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_diagnoses_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "medications" (
  "medication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each medication */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient prescribed the medication */,
  "physician_id" INTEGER /* ID of the physician who prescribed the medication */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department where the medication was prescribed */,
  "medication_name" TEXT /* Name of the medication */,
  "prescription_date" TEXT /* Date when the medication was prescribed */,
  "dosage" TEXT /* Dosage of the medication */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the medication */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the medication */,
  "refills" INTEGER /* Number of refills */,
  "medication_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the medication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("medication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_medications_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_medications_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES providers ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_medications_physician_id FOREIGN KEY ("physician_id") REFERENCES providers ("provider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comorbidities" (
  "comorbidity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comorbidity */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient with the comorbidity */,
  "physician_id" INTEGER /* ID of the physician who identified the comorbidity */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department where the comorbidity was identified */,
  "comorbidity_name" TEXT /* Name of the comorbidity */,
  "comorbidity_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the comorbidity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comorbidity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comorbidities_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES providers ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comorbidities_physician_id FOREIGN KEY ("physician_id") REFERENCES providers ("provider_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comorbidities_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "outcomes" (
  "outcome_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each outcome */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient with the outcome */,
  "physician_id" INTEGER /* ID of the physician who recorded the outcome */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department where the outcome was recorded */,
  "outcome" TEXT /* Description of the outcome */,
  "outcome_date" TEXT /* Date when the outcome was observed */,
  "outcome_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the outcome */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("outcome_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_outcomes_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES providers ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_outcomes_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_outcomes_physician_id FOREIGN KEY ("physician_id") REFERENCES providers ("provider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "labs" (
  "lab_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lab test */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient undergoing the lab test */,
  "physician_id" INTEGER /* ID of the physician who ordered the lab test */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department where the lab test was ordered */,
  "test_name" TEXT /* Name of the lab test */,
  "test_result" TEXT /* Result of the lab test */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date when the lab test was performed */,
  "lab_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the lab test */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lab_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_labs_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_labs_physician_id FOREIGN KEY ("physician_id") REFERENCES providers ("provider_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_labs_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES providers ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "visits" (
  "visit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visit */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient making the visit */,
  "physician_id" INTEGER /* ID of the physician who conducted the visit */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department where the visit took place */,
  "visit_date" TEXT /* Date of the visit */,
  "visit_type" TEXT /* Type of visit (e.g., outpatient, inpatient) */,
  "visit_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the visit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visits_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES providers ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visits_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visits_physician_id FOREIGN KEY ("physician_id") REFERENCES providers ("provider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "providers" (
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each healthcare provider */,
  "provider_name" TEXT /* Name of the healthcare provider */,
  "specialty" TEXT /* Specialty of the healthcare provider */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department the provider is associated with */,
  "license_number" TEXT /* License number of the healthcare provider */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the healthcare provider */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the healthcare provider */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the healthcare provider */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("provider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "provider_patients" (
  "provider_patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the association between provider and patient */,
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* ID of the healthcare provider */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the provider started treating the patient */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the provider stopped treating the patient (if applicable) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the provider-patient relationship */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("provider_patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_provider_patients_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_provider_patients_provider_id FOREIGN KEY ("provider_id") REFERENCES providers ("provider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patient_notes" (
  "note_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each note */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient for whom the note is recorded */,
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* ID of the healthcare provider who recorded the note */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department where the note was recorded */,
  "note_date" TEXT /* Date when the note was recorded */,
  "note_type" TEXT /* Type of note (e.g., follow-up, initial visit) */,
  "note_text" TEXT /* Text of the note */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("note_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_notes_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES providers ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_notes_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_notes_provider_id FOREIGN KEY ("provider_id") REFERENCES providers ("provider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patient_allergies" (
  "allergy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each allergy */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient with the allergy */,
  "physician_id" INTEGER /* ID of the physician who recorded the allergy */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department where the allergy was recorded */,
  "allergy_name" TEXT /* Name of the allergy */,
  "allergy_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the allergy */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("allergy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_allergies_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_allergies_physician_id FOREIGN KEY ("physician_id") REFERENCES providers ("provider_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_allergies_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES providers ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patient_family_history" (
  "family_history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each family history record */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient with the family history */,
  "physician_id" INTEGER /* ID of the physician who recorded the family history */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department where the family history was recorded */,
  "family_member" TEXT /* Name of the family member */,
  "condition" TEXT /* Health condition in the family history */,
  "family_history_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the family history */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("family_history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_family_history_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_family_history_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES providers ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_family_history_physician_id FOREIGN KEY ("physician_id") REFERENCES providers ("provider_id")
)
